hero.headline: Create Factur-X Invoices
hero.subheadline: Generate EN 16931 compliant e-invoices — PDF/A-3 with embedded CII XML

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Fill out the invoice form or upload an existing invoice (PDF, CSV, Excel, MT940, image).
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our engine produces an EN 16931 compliant Factur-X invoice with CII XML and PDF/A-3.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Download your Factur-X PDF — machine-readable and legally compliant.

en16931.title: EN 16931 Compliant
en16931.desc: Full conformance with the European standard for electronic invoicing.

pdfa3.title: PDF/A-3 Format
pdfa3.desc: Long-term archival per ISO 19005-3:2012 with embedded XML file.

cii_xml.title: Embedded CII XML
cii_xml.desc: UN/CEFACT Cross Industry Invoice as factur-x.xml embedded in the PDF.

all_formats.title: All File Formats
all_formats.desc: PDF, CSV, Excel, MT940, camt.053, images — with AI-powered recognition.

ai_parsing.title: AI Recognition
ai_parsing.desc: Intelligent data extraction from any invoice document.

batch.title: Batch Processing
batch.desc: Upload CSV/Excel and generate multiple Factur-X invoices at once.

mandate.title: Mandate Ready
mandate.desc: Compliant with the French B2B e-invoicing timeline (PPF 2026–2027).

xmp_metadata.title: XMP Metadata
xmp_metadata.desc: Complete fx namespace declaration per Factur-X 1.0.8 specification.

timeline.title: French E-Invoicing Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Portail Public de Facturation (PPF)
timeline.phase1_desc: All VAT-registered businesses must be able to receive electronic invoices in Factur-X, UBL or CII format via PPF.
timeline.phase2_desc: Small and medium enterprises must issue compliant electronic invoices for all domestic B2B transactions.
timeline.phase3_desc: Micro-enterprises must also issue compliant e-invoices.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Factur-X is the Franco-German electronic invoicing format. It combines a visual PDF with machine-readable XML, compliant with the EN 16931 standard.
faq.a2: EN 16931 is the European standard for the semantic data model of core elements of an electronic invoice.
faq.q3: When does the e-invoicing mandate start?
faq.a3: From September 1, 2026, all businesses must accept e-invoices. From September 2027, SMEs must issue them. Micro-enterprises follow in September 2028.
faq.a4: PDF/A-3 is an ISO standard for long-term archival of PDF documents that also allows embedded files like XML.
faq.q5: Which file formats can I upload?
faq.a5: PDF, CSV, Excel (XLSX/XLS), MT940, camt.053 XML, and images (JPG, PNG, HEIC) of invoices.
faq.a6: Our AI analyzes uploaded documents and automatically extracts all relevant invoice fields according to EN 16931.
faq.a7: SIREN is the unique 9-digit identifier assigned to every business in France by INSEE. It is required on compliant invoices.
